title: deterministic render keeps byte-stable prefix under unchanged bindings

input.scenario: same ContextView rendered twice under identical object versions, target profile and renderer version; then one unrelated object is added and the view is re-resolved

notes: Declarative scenario; not implementation evidence. Provider caches match on cumulative prefix bytes, so relative-order preservation alone is insufficient: bytes of already-rendered prefix segments must not change when unrelated objects are added under an unchanged Conversation binding.
